---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the project
title: "[Feature Request]"
labels: ["feature request"]
assignees: []
---

## Overview
Provide a brief overview of the feature you are requesting.

## Agricultural Features
- What specific agricultural features are you suggesting?
- How does this feature contribute to the agricultural domain?

## Use Cases
- Describe the practical applications of the proposed feature.
- Who would benefit from this feature?

## Technical Approach
- Outline the technical implementation of the feature.
- Are there any APIs, libraries, or technologies that you plan to use?

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

---

Thank you for your contribution! We will review your request as soon as possible.
